_comment: Manual data overrides applied at render time. These survive `npm run fetch` (which only rewrites the per-category subscriber data). Keyed by publication URL (matched case-insensitively, ignoring scheme / leading 'www.' / trailing slash). 'totalSubscribers' overrides the Total Subs value; 'estimated': true appends an asterisk that points to the footnote; 'displayUrl' overrides only the link shown in the URL column (the original URL is still used to match lean/baseline data).
